Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-29 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows a stark contrast between two top-ranked securities. ADTTF dominates with a perfect rank of 1 and exceptionally clean momentum metrics, posting a 10-year return of 9,552.63% with consistent acceleration across all timeframes (1-month through 5-year ratios all above 1.4x) and maintaining position above all major moving averages. In sharp contrast, ATEX ranks second with significant structural weaknesses: while it shows explosive 6-month returns of 339.95%, its momentum deteriorates sharply at longer horizons, with the 5-year return collapsing to just 60.03% and the 1-year-to-5-year ratio plummeting to 0.22, indicating this recent rally has reversed years of underperformance. ADTTF's outperformance versus SPY, QQQ, and IAU across all three measured periods (1y/5y/10y) combined with its 94.4 overall score and "strong_buy" flag reflects sustained secular strength, while ATEX's deteriorating multi-year returns and maximum bad_spy_score of 1.0 suggest recent momentum may not reflect healthy long-term positioning.
